seoTitle: Quarry Hill vs Raglan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Quarry Hill and Raglan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Quarry Hill vs Raglan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Quarry Hill and Raglan.
heading: Quarry Hill vs Raglan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Quarry Hill, Victoria and Raglan, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Raglan has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Quarry Hill (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Quarry Hill or Raglan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Quarry Hill has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Raglan scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Quarry Hill scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Raglan scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Quarry Hill or Raglan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Raglan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
